subcodes.first_line: O Attar, as far as thou art able, scatter thy musk-laden fragrance upon the world, that hearts may be perfumed from the mystic essence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عطار تا توانی نفحه مشکبار بر عالم نثار کن تا مشامها از نافه اسرار معطر
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @spiritual transformation, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
